tasks.description: Fix maven.compiler.source/target in wallet-core and audit-worker to match Java 21
tasks.requirements: Remove or update the maven.compiler.source and maven.compiler.target properties in wallet-core/pom.xml and audit-worker/pom.xml. These modules currently override the parent's Java 21 setting with Java 17. Either remove the overrides so they inherit java.version=21 from the parent POM, or explicitly set them to 21. This ensures consistent compilation across all modules.

tasks.description: Upgrade Spring Boot from 3.2.5 to latest 4.0.x release
tasks.requirements: Update the parent POM spring-boot-starter-parent version from 3.2.5 to the latest Spring Boot 4.0.x GA release. This is the core upgrade that drives all other dependency updates. Spring Boot 4.x brings Spring Framework 7.0.x, Jakarta EE 11 APIs, and Hibernate 7.x. After updating the parent version, verify that all spring-boot-starter-* dependencies resolve correctly across all three modules (api-gateway, wallet-core, audit-worker). Update the spring-boot-maven-plugin if its version is explicitly pinned anywhere.

tasks.description: Upgrade Spring Cloud to the release train compatible with Spring Boot 4.x
tasks.requirements: Update the spring-cloud.version property in api-gateway/pom.xml from 2023.0.3 to the Spring Cloud release train compatible with Spring Boot 4.x (expected: 2025.0.x). Update the spring-cloud-dependencies BOM version accordingly. Verify spring-cloud-starter-gateway resolves and is compatible. Check for any renamed or restructured Gateway starter artifacts. Review api-gateway application.yml for any deprecated Spring Cloud Gateway configuration properties (e.g., spring.cloud.gateway.httpclient changes).

tasks.description: Upgrade springdoc-openapi to version compatible with Spring Boot 4.x
tasks.requirements: Update springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui version in wallet-core/pom.xml from 2.5.0 to the latest version compatible with Spring Boot 4.x and Spring Framework 7.x. The springdoc 2.x line may need to be updated to a 2.8.x+ or 3.x version that supports the new Spring Framework version. Verify that the Swagger UI endpoint (/swagger-ui.html or /swagger-ui/index.html) and OpenAPI JSON endpoint (/v3/api-docs) are still functional after the upgrade.

tasks.description: Upgrade Redisson to version compatible with Spring Boot 4.x
tasks.requirements: Update the redisson.version property in the parent pom.xml from 3.43.0 to the latest version of Redisson that provides a spring-boot-starter compatible with Spring Boot 4.x autoconfiguration. Redisson's Spring Boot starter must support the new Spring Boot 4.x autoconfiguration model. Verify that redisson-spring-boot-starter resolves and that Redis-related autoconfiguration works alongside spring-boot-starter-data-redis-reactive in api-gateway and the Redisson client in wallet-core.

tasks.description: Upgrade Lombok to latest compatible version and maven-compiler-plugin to latest
tasks.requirements: Update lombok.version in the parent pom.xml from 1.18.46 to the latest 1.18.x release that supports Java 21 and Spring Boot 4.x annotation processing. Update maven-compiler-plugin from 3.13.0 to the latest 3.x release (3.14.x+). Also update jib-maven-plugin from 3.4.0 to the latest version. Ensure Lombok annotation processing still works correctly in the maven-compiler-plugin annotationProcessorPaths configuration. Remove any hardcoded Lombok versions in wallet-core/pom.xml and audit-worker/pom.xml if they should inherit from the parent property instead.

tasks.description: Handle Spring Boot 4.x breaking changes across all modules
tasks.requirements:
Address all Spring Boot 4.x breaking changes across the codebase:

1. **Jakarta EE 11 changes**: Verify all jakarta.* imports are compatible with Jakarta EE 11 (Spring Boot 3.x already uses jakarta.* but some APIs may have changed in EE 11).

2. **Hibernate 7.x changes**: Update spring.jpa.database-platform property in wallet-core and audit-worker application.yml — org.hibernate.dialect.PostgreSQLDialect may be deprecated or removed. Hibernate 7.x uses automatic dialect detection.

3. **Configuration property changes**: Review all application.yml files for deprecated or renamed Spring Boot properties. Key areas:
   - spring.jackson.* property changes
   - spring.datasource.hikari.* property changes
   - spring.cloud.gateway.* property changes
   - spring.kafka.* property changes

4. **Removed deprecated APIs**: Scan Java source files for usage of APIs deprecated in Spring Boot 3.x that are removed in 4.x.

5. **Spring Security changes** (if applicable): Check for any security-related configuration changes.

6. **Spring Kafka changes**: Verify Kafka listener/producer configuration compatibility with the Spring Kafka version bundled in Spring Boot 4.x.

tasks.description: Update Dockerfiles and Jib plugin if base image versions need updating
tasks.requirements: Review and update Dockerfiles in api-gateway/, wallet-core/, and audit-worker/. Currently all use eclipse-temurin:21-jre-alpine which is already on Java 21 and should remain compatible. Verify the base image tag is current and not referencing an EOL Alpine version. Update jib-maven-plugin's from.image in the parent pom.xml if needed (currently eclipse-temurin:21-jdk). Ensure the ENTRYPOINT and EXPOSE configurations are still correct for Spring Boot 4.x (Spring Boot 4.x should still produce executable JARs via the same mechanism).

tasks.description: Verify full multi-module build compiles successfully after all changes
tasks.requirements: Run a full Maven build from the parent project root (mvn clean compile -DskipTests) to verify all modules compile without errors. Then run mvn verify to execute unit tests across all modules. Fix any remaining compilation errors or test failures. Ensure all three modules (api-gateway, wallet-core, audit-worker) build independently and as part of the reactor build. Verify that Maven dependency resolution completes without conflicts or missing artifacts.
